---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new ecosystem, output format, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like depfresh to do?

A clear description of the feature or change.

## Use case

What problem does this solve for you? "I'm trying to ... but depfresh can't ..."

## Ecosystem (if applicable)

If this is about a new manifest format or registry, name the ecosystem and link
to the format's documentation.

## Additional context

Anything else — example manifests, related tools, or alternatives you've tried.
